title: The Seven Deadly Sins
director: Yves Allégret, Claude Autant-Lara, Eduardo De Filippo
writer: Jean Aurenche, Claude Autant-Lara, Jules-Amédée Barbey d'Aurevilly
actors: Michèle Morgan, Françoise Rosay, Jean Debucourt
plot: A French/Italian co-production with two episodes from Italy and five from France covering the seven deadly sins---actually eight as two of the sins are covered in one episode while a new "eighth unknown sin" has an episode of its ...
